input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8858 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.sonatype.sisu:sisu-guice:2.9.1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The 2.9.1 jar relocates internal ASM/CGLIB/utility classes under Guice internals with '$'-prefixed class names; generated tests that import non-public upstream internals like com.google.inject.internal.cglib.core.Signature or MapMaker will not compile.
Meaningful tests should use public Guice APIs such as Guice.createInjector, AbstractModule bindings, injection, scopes, providers, and interceptors rather than relying on internal relocated classes.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is required: sisu-guice is a self-contained Guice core artifact, and its required compile/runtime dependencies are declared transitively in the POM.
